column2: fetch             : run fetch.py to fetch data from the sheet then write to data/raw_data.csv.
fit               : run fit.py to fit the function to the data.
show              : run visualize.py to show a plot of the data and the preds.
get <none_or_cfg> : show the value of a configuration entry. if unspecified show all.
set <cfg> <value> : set the value of a configuration entry.
? <none_or_cmd>   : show help for a given command. if unspecified show all.
help <none_or_cmd>: show help for a given command. if unspecified show all.
